pi_items.source: Task conceptual role explicitly matching the system administration requirements of the task
Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh namespace creation commands and YAML manifest
Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh YAML manifest and queried in export_result.sh
Defined in verifier.py evaluation logic where passed = score >= 70

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated kubernetes environment injected via setup_task.sh. The target namespace ('data-platform'), target StatefulSet ('postgres-primary'), and passing score threshold of 70 (requiring 3 out of 4 injected failures to be remediated) explicitly match the task description instructions and verifier.py evaluation logic.
